zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Stephen Popham於大約1386年出生在英國哈普爾波法姆時，他的父親Henry Popham49歲，母親Joan Frank28歲。他於1410年之前與Margaret Rede結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1444年11月12日在英國英格蘭哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特卡利斯布盧可享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Stephen Popham于大约1386年出生在英国哈普爾波法姆时，他的父亲Henry Popham49岁，母亲Joan Frank28岁。他于1410年之前与Margaret Rede结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1444年11月12日在英国英格兰哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特卡利斯布盧可享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Popham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Hampshire, so called from an unattested short form of Old English popel ‘pebble’ + Old English hām ‘village, homestead’.

History: The Popham Colony was the first organized attempt to establish an English colony on the shores of what is now known as New England, then called Northern Virginia. George Popham of Hunstworth, Somerset, England, helped establish the colony at the mouth of the Kennebec River in 1607. It lasted for little over a year until it was abandoned in 1608. Although George died that same year, he may have had descendants or relatives with him as there are Pophams in the US who trace their family roots to the colony.

variants.name: Poplin
meanings: English: at least in part, a variant of   Popham  .

nameMeanings.name: Stephen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

variants.name: Stephan
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , preserving the vowels of the Greek name.

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , reflecting the normal pronunciation of the name in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Stephen Popham was born about 1386, in Popham, Hampshire, England, his father, Henry Popham, was 49 and his mother, Joan Frank, was 28. He married Margaret Rede before 1410. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died on 12 November 1444, in Carisbrooke, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Carisbrooke, Hampshire, England: Carisbrooke, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Stephen Popham est né environ 1386, à Popham, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Popham, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Joan Frank, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Rede avant 1410. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé le 12 novembre 1444, à Carisbrooke, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Carisbrooke, Hampshire, England: Carisbrooke, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Stephen Popham um 1386 in Popham, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Popham 49 und seine Mutter Joan Frank 28. Er hat vor 1410 Margaret Rede geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 12. November 1444 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Carisbrooke, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Margaret Rede prima del 1410. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 12 novembre 1444, nel Carisbrooke, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.Carisbrooke, Hampshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트 카리스브룩
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Stephen Popham(이)가 대략 1386년 영국 함프실르 포프아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Popham(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Frank(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1410년 이전 Margaret Rede(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1444년 11월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트 카리스브룩에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Stephen Popham nasceu aproximadamente 1386, em Popham, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Popham, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Joan Frank, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Rede antes 1410. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de novembro de 1444, em Carisbrooke, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Carisbrooke, Hampshire, England: карисбрук, исл оф ваит, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Stephen Popham родился около 1386 г. в местности пофам, хампшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Popham было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Frank, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Rede перед 1410 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер 12 ноября 1444 г. в местности карисбрук, исл оф ваит, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
